chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-45 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w ASI Manzoor Ahmed Langah of P.S, Khanpur Mahar. **** Learned AAG files a joint statement on behalf of respondents No.2&3, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. Learned AAG further submits that due protection will be provided to the petitioners as and when required. It is case of the petitioners that they have been declared ‘Karo-Kari’ by the respondents No.4 to 9 and they are trying to commit their murder. Under the circumstances, SSP, Ghotki is directed to provide protection to the petitioners as and they required and if any harm is caused to them, he will be personally held responsible for such harm. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to SSP, Ghotki for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
